title: Minecraft Backrooms Found Footage
description: A mod that aims to turn Minecraft into a Found Footage Game.
body:
![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f340a595f4c68523f0200e35ffab113dba581c02.png)

## Minecraft Found Footage is a mod that aims to bring the feeling and aesthetic of "Found Footage" videos to Minecraft This mod adds in custom shaders and camera effects using Veil and is **not compatible with sodium or iris**\ The mod also has issues with integrated graphics and DOES NOT WORK with MacOS (we tried)\ **Use Mod menu to access the config** \ Suffocating yourself in any way for long enough will eventually cause you to noclip into the backrooms, where you have to travel through all 5 levels to escape: --- 1. **Level 0** ---------------------- _The backrooms we all know and love_ 2. **Level 1** ---------------------- _The Habitable Zone_ 3. **Level 2** ---------------------- _Pipe Dreams_ 4. **Level 324** ------------------- _The Forgotten Station_ 5. **The Poolrooms** -------------- _The Poolrooms_ O.o 6. **The Infinite Grass Field** ----- _This one's different_\ \ For better descriptions of each level, **[Read the wiki](https://github.com/SpacePotatoee/MinecraftFoundFootage/wiki)** --- The mod also adds four commands just in case: - **/skinwalker **: Just in case the skinwalker refuses to spawn naturally, you can do this to have the skinwalker take the skin of your target. _Don't tell anyone :D_ - **/release **: Releases the target from the skinwalker if the target has had their skin stolen - **/backroomsevent **: Manually triggers an event - **/gimmemyinventoryback **: Restores the saved inventory of the specified targets from before they entered the Backrooms - **/level **: Manually teleport yourself to a certain level. **Please report any bugs you may find to the [GitHub Page](https://github.com/SpacePotatoee/MinecraftFoundFootage)** ### If the mod does NOT work, make sure you're following all of the steps below: - Download Simple Voice Chat and Geckolib. **You do not need to download veil**. It's already included - Do not use sodium or iris. This mod uses Veil which, in 1.20.1, is incompatible with either - Do not use _Fabulous!_ graphics. Only Fast or Fancy - Do not remove Veil's deferred resource pack ### Notes - The skinwalker does not spawn naturally in singleplayer. I really didn't see a point - There are a few bugs with devices that use integrated graphics and Mac OS
